name: Harvey Wallbanger Cake ~
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cake mix and pudding in an electric mixer bowl.
2. Add oil, eggs, Galliano, vodka, and orange juice to the dry ingredients.
3. Blend on low speed until the dry ingredients are dampened.
4. Turn up the speed and beat for 5 minutes.
5. Preheat the electric fry pan to 280 degrees Fahrenheit.
6. Grease the pan well.
7. Pour the batter into the preheated pan and cover it.
8. Bake for about 45 minutes, or until the top of the cake is moist but not sticky.
9. During the last 5 minutes of baking, open the vent to allow steam to escape.
10. The cake works well in a 12 x 12 x 2-inch size frying pan.
11. Combine confectioners' sugar, orange juice, remaining Galliano, and vodka for the frosting.
12. Drizzle the frosting over the cooled cake.
